blurb: 30 paper-curated long-horizon tasks. Each one demands real professional expertise. Edit this file to change the list.

items.blurb: Segment cerebrum and lateral ventricles on a brain MRI inside 3D Slicer, then compute the brain parenchymal fraction. Real radiology workflow.
In Liverpool Cancer iChart, pick the oncology drug with the fewest red interactions and propose safer co-medication substitutions.
Use VistA — the U.S. Veterans Affairs EHR — to find the highest-risk patient by pharmacy and allergy data and produce a complete clinical dossier.
Build a multi-tissue neurosurgical case-conference package in InVesalius with optimized 3D surfaces ready for the OR.
Design and simulate a Mars hyperbolic-approach orbit capture in NASA GMAT using two periapsis burns. Yes, the actual NASA mission tool.
Run multi-band aperture photometry on the M12 globular cluster and calibrate it into a color-magnitude diagram in AstroImageJ.
Determine eclipse contact times for the Aug 12 2026 Arctic total solar eclipse from a specific lat/lon in Stellarium.
Redesign a competition rocket in OpenRocket so it simultaneously satisfies stability, acceleration, and impact constraints.
Restore eCRM-001 aircraft longitudinal stability by resizing the horizontal tail using NASA OpenVSP's VSPAero VLM solver.
Prepare a thermal search-and-rescue drone mission in QGroundControl/ArduCopter and export the required parameter package.
Run hash-based exfiltration analysis between corporate and suspect USB images in Autopsy and produce a courtroom-ready evidence trail.
Analyze a Wireshark packet capture to extract evidence from a web-application breach end-to-end.
Investigate distributed Wazuh alerts to reconstruct an APT attack chain, then add correlated detection rules so it can't happen quietly again.
Set up a hidden VeraCrypt volume inside a deniable container and verify both compartments behave correctly. Snowden-grade plausible deniability.
Generate a Northern Hemisphere winter atmospheric-circulation diagnostic in Panoply with combined overlay plots from NetCDF climate data.
Set up and validate a complete automated teleseismic earthquake detection pipeline in SeisComP with offline waveform playback.
Generate a floodplain technical report by extracting HEC-RAS peak water-surface elevations and velocities — the same workflow FEMA uses.
Compare kinase selectivity in PyMOL by superimposing three drug-bound structures, mapping pocket conservation, and writing a structural-biology brief.
Design a restriction-enzyme cloning plan in UGENE and export annotated GenBank files plus a vector map. Real synthetic-biology bench work.
Quantify per-channel cell morphology on a confocal 3-channel image stack in Fiji/ImageJ — the standard cell-biology pipeline.
Build a SLAM benchmark world in Webots and implement a sensor-logging controller to collect ground-truth trajectories.
Calibrate a Universal Robots UR5 digital twin in CoppeliaSim by collecting kinematic and dynamic characterization data.
Prepare linked spousal 2024 tax returns in StudioTax and optimize the lifetime capital gains exemption — Canadian tax law in motion.
Optimize an automated trading strategy on SPY in NinjaTrader, select best parameters, backtest, and prepare a deployable instance.
Clean outbreak-survey data and run risk-factor + multivariable logistic regression in CDC's Epi Info to find the source.
In PEBL, exclude a random-bot participant and fit single-rate and dual-rate Rescorla-Wagner reinforcement-learning models to the human data.
Audit and complete Rancher multi-team Kubernetes governance to match a written compliance specification — exactly.
Mix Episode 12 in Ardour, apply a producer's mixing notes, deliver stems with chapter markers — the full broadcast podcast workflow.
Reconstruct a maritime collision in Bridge Command from VDR/VTS data, compute CPA/TCPA, and design a COLREG-compliant avoidance maneuver.
Find the battery capacity that maximizes NPV from PV curtailment + time-of-use arbitrage in NREL's System Advisor Model.
